title: Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple
tagline: Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Nemmara is a town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Nemmara is a town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. It is administered by the Nemmara Grama Panchayat. The town hosts Nemmara Vallanghy Vela one of the popular annual festival in the state with fireworks as the major attraction. Nemmara is the entry point to the Nelliampathi hills, which are located at the foothills of Western Ghats.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Aathanad
topPlaces.description: Aathanad is a mountain situated in Vallanghy, Nemmara, in the Palakkad district of Kerala, India. It is famous for the Ayyappa Temple at the top of the mountain and the festival held there annually on Malayalam month Dhanu 9 (24 December).

topPlaces.name: Pallavur
topPlaces.description: Pallavur is a village situated in the Chittur Taluk, Palakkad district of Kerala, India. It is close to Kollengode Town, Nemmara and Koduvayur.

topPlaces.name: Melarcode
topPlaces.description: Melarcode is a village and Gram Panchayat in Palakkad District, Kerala, South India. "Mayilattoor" was the former name of Melarcode ("Mayil" meaning peacock), probably due to the presence of many peacocks in the village.

topPlaces.name: Elavancherry
topPlaces.description: Elavanchery is a village and gram panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. It is situated on the foothills of Nelliyampathy mountain ranges, a part of the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Ayiloor
topPlaces.description: Ayiloor, also known as Ayilur, Aylur, or Ayalur, is a village in the Chittur Thaluk of Palakkad district, state of Kerala, India. Ayiloor is located about 30 kilometers away from Palakkad town and 48 kilometers from Thrissur town.

topPlaces.name: Kairady
topPlaces.description: Kairady is a village in the Palakkad district, state of Kerala, India. It forms a part of the Ayiloor gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kunissery
topPlaces.description: Kunissery is a village in the Palakkad district of Kerala state, South India. The closest towns are Alathur (about 7 km away) and Kollengode (about 10 km).

topPlaces.name: Adiperanda
topPlaces.description: Adiperanda is a village near Nemmara in Palakkad district, Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Nellikulangara Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Aathanad, Pallavur, Melarcode, Elavancherry, Ayiloor.
